text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Integrated Physical/Mental Health Services * Native American Community 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF NATIVE AMERICAN REHABILITATION ASSOCIATION OF THE NORTHWEST NARA NW TOTEM LODGE TOTEM LODGE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides physical health, mental health, addictions treatment, and outreach services. Care is provided by a team of primary care providers, mental health providers, case managers, care coordinators, certified addictions counselors, psychiatric providers, and medical assistants. 1438 SE Division Street Portland, OR 97202 Eligibility: Individuals who identify as Native American or Alaskan Native Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (503) 307-7775 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NATIVE AMERICAN REHABILITATION ASSOCIATION OF THE NORTHWEST TOTEM LODGE
